rules.source: ##iframe[style="position: absolute; top: -1000px; left: -1000px; visibility: hidden; border: medium none; background-color: transparent;"]
##body > div[style="position: fixed; display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; inset: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); z-index: 300000;"]
##body > div[style^="position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 2147483647; background: black; opacity: 0.01;"]
##body > div[style^="position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 2147483647; background-color: transparent; pointer-events: auto; cursor: auto; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"]
